command: bash -c for u in "https://www.neuron.yale.edu/neuron/static/papers/nc97.pdf" "https://www.neuron.yale.edu/neuron/static/papers/NC97.pdf" "https://neuron.yale.edu/ftp/ted/neuron/nc97.pdf" "https://www.neuron.yale.edu/ftp/ted/neuron/nc97.pdf"; do echo "=== $u ==="; curl -s -L -I -w "HTTP:%{http_code} CT:%{content_type}\n" "$u" 2>&1 | tail -3; done
